channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump, Allies Are Working on Plan to 'Expunge' Impeachments
item.description: President Donald Trump and congressional allies are discussing a formal move to erase his two impeachments from the House record.

item.title: Unearthed DOJ emails expose turmoil over Biden-era memo urging crackdown on parents
item.description: Internal DOJ emails reveal officials called Garland's 2021 school board memo 'stupid' and warned it could appear as an 'Anti-MAGA Task Force.'

item.title: Court Rejects Kennedy Center Bid to Keep Trump's Name
item.description: A judge denied the Kennedy Center's request to pause a ruling ordering President Donald Trump's name removed from the building.

item.title: RNC Chair to Newsmax: GOP in 'Phenomenal Position' Before Midterms
item.description: Republican National Committee Chair Joe Gruters expressed confidence in GOP prospects for the 2026 midterms, citing President Donald Trump's policies.
